channel.title: Steam New Games
channel.description: RSS feed for Steam New Games.

item.title: The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales
item.description:
Title: The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales
Genre: Action , Adventure , RPG
Developer: Square Enix , Claytechworks
Publisher: Square Enix
Release Date: Jun 18, 2026




About This Game



A brand-new action RPG from the creators of OCTOPATH TRAVELER and BRAVELY DEFAULT – The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales combines stunning HD-2D visuals and exciting action-adventure gameplay for the first time!

The adventurer Elliot and his fairy sidekick Faie set off on a journey across four ages to fulfill a thousand-year mission.

Enjoy intuitive and rewarding action-based battles with strategic support abilities from a fairy as you reveal this world’s mysterious history.

• Seven Weapon Types and Fairy Magic

Arm yourself with up to two weapons at a time to do battle with the beast tribes that overrun the continent. Faie’s fairy magic will prove handy in clearing both the fiends and puzzles that stand in your way.

• The Four Ages of a Millennium

To lift the curse on Princess Heuria of Huther, Elliot and Faie will cross through the Doorway of Time to visit different periods in history.

Elliot’s home time, the Age of Safekeeping…
The Age of Reconstruction, in which humans eke out a meager existence…
Humanity’s height of prosperity in the Age of Magic…
And the Age of Budding, the birth of human civilization.

Across every age, a terrible threat looms over Elliot and Faie’s adventure.

• Personalized Adventuring with Magicite

Customize Elliot’s weapons by equipping different combinations of magicite found during the journey. Try out all sorts of variations and confront obstacles using your own methods.
Descrierea conținutului pentru adulți indisponibilă.

System Requirements

Windows

    Minimum:
    • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
    • OS: Windows® 11
    • Processor: AMD Ryzen™ 3 3100 / Intel® Core™ i3-8100
    • Memory: 16 GB RAM
    • Graphics: AMD Radeon™ RX 5500 XT / Intel® Arc™ A580 / NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 1650
    • DirectX: Version 12
    • Storage: 20 GB available space
    • Additional Notes: 1280x720, Graphics Preset "Low", 60FPS
    Recommended:
    • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
    • OS: Windows® 11
    • Processor: AMD Ryzen™ 3 3100 / Intel® Core™ i5-8600K
    • Memory: 16 GB RAM
    • Graphics: AMD Radeon™ RX 5600XT / Intel® Arc™ A580 / NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 1660 Ti
    • DirectX: Version 12
    • Storage: 20 GB available space
    • Additional Notes: 1920x1080, Graphics Preset "High", 60FPS
item.content:encoded:
Title: The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales
Genre: Action , Adventure , RPG
Developer: Square Enix , Claytechworks
Publisher: Square Enix
Release Date: Jun 18, 2026




About This Game



A brand-new action RPG from the creators of OCTOPATH TRAVELER and BRAVELY DEFAULT – The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales combines stunning HD-2D visuals and exciting action-adventure gameplay for the first time!

The adventurer Elliot and his fairy sidekick Faie set off on a journey across four ages to fulfill a thousand-year mission.

Enjoy intuitive and rewarding action-based battles with strategic support abilities from a fairy as you reveal this world’s mysterious history.

• Seven Weapon Types and Fairy Magic

Arm yourself with up to two weapons at a time to do battle with the beast tribes that overrun the continent. Faie’s fairy magic will prove handy in clearing both the fiends and puzzles that stand in your way.

• The Four Ages of a Millennium

To lift the curse on Princess Heuria of Huther, Elliot and Faie will cross through the Doorway of Time to visit different periods in history.

Elliot’s home time, the Age of Safekeeping…
The Age of Reconstruction, in which humans eke out a meager existence…
Humanity’s height of prosperity in the Age of Magic…
And the Age of Budding, the birth of human civilization.

Across every age, a terrible threat looms over Elliot and Faie’s adventure.

• Personalized Adventuring with Magicite

Customize Elliot’s weapons by equipping different combinations of magicite found during the journey. Try out all sorts of variations and confront obstacles using your own methods.
Descrierea conținutului pentru adulți indisponibilă.

System Requirements

Windows

    Minimum:
    • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
    • OS: Windows® 11
    • Processor: AMD Ryzen™ 3 3100 / Intel® Core™ i3-8100
    • Memory: 16 GB RAM
    • Graphics: AMD Radeon™ RX 5500 XT / Intel® Arc™ A580 / NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 1650
    • DirectX: Version 12
    • Storage: 20 GB available space
    • Additional Notes: 1280x720, Graphics Preset "Low", 60FPS
    Recommended:
    • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
    • OS: Windows® 11
    • Processor: AMD Ryzen™ 3 3100 / Intel® Core™ i5-8600K
    • Memory: 16 GB RAM
    • Graphics: AMD Radeon™ RX 5600XT / Intel® Arc™ A580 / NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 1660 Ti
    • DirectX: Version 12
    • Storage: 20 GB available space
    • Additional Notes: 1920x1080, Graphics Preset "High", 60FPS

item.title: DAVE THE DIVER - In the Jungle Content Pack
item.description:
Title: DAVE THE DIVER - In the Jungle Content Pack
Genre: Adventure , Casual , RPG , Simulation
Developer: MINTROCKET
Publisher: MINTROCKET
Release Date: Jun 18, 2026




About This Content

Dave’s adventure continues, this time in the heart of the jungle.

Leaving the Blue Hole behind, Dave and his crew travel to the jungle to investigate a mysterious phenomenon reported in the village of Utara. Beneath the jungle lake awaits a brand-new ecosystem to explore, along with new missions and discoveries.

Featuring over 10 hours of new story and gameplay, DAVE THE DIVER - In the Jungle Content Pack introduces new systems, new locations, and thrilling new adventures beyond the ocean.

・Freshwater Lake - Discover a whole new ecosystem

Prepare to encounter unfamiliar creatures, discover new ingredients, and face the hidden dangers lurking deep within an ancient underwater civilization.

・Bancho Grill - New restaurant, new menu, same Bancho standards

Welcome to Bancho Grill, where bold jungle ingredients meet Bancho’s uncompromising culinary craft. Build relationships with the villagers and they might stop by as guests. See for yourself whether Bancho’s legendary cooking can win over the jungle too!

・Utara Village - a warm welcome in the jungle

Lend a hand to the villagers and build meaningful relationships. Some may be wary of outsiders at first… but a thoughtful gift or a great meal can go a long way!

・The jungle runs deeper

The jungle holds more than just villages and lakes. From mysterious ancient temples to eerie forests, Dave and his crew’s adventure continues deeper into the unknown!

AI Generated Content Disclosure

The developers describe how their game uses AI Generated Content like this:

Generative AI is used only to assist with localization/translation. All localized text is reviewed and edited by the developer.

No AI-generated art, audio, or in-game live generation is used.



System Requirements

Windows

MacOS
item.content:encoded:
Title: DAVE THE DIVER - In the Jungle Content Pack
Genre: Adventure , Casual , RPG , Simulation
Developer: MINTROCKET
Publisher: MINTROCKET
Release Date: Jun 18, 2026




About This Content

Dave’s adventure continues, this time in the heart of the jungle.

Leaving the Blue Hole behind, Dave and his crew travel to the jungle to investigate a mysterious phenomenon reported in the village of Utara. Beneath the jungle lake awaits a brand-new ecosystem to explore, along with new missions and discoveries.

Featuring over 10 hours of new story and gameplay, DAVE THE DIVER - In the Jungle Content Pack introduces new systems, new locations, and thrilling new adventures beyond the ocean.

・Freshwater Lake - Discover a whole new ecosystem

Prepare to encounter unfamiliar creatures, discover new ingredients, and face the hidden dangers lurking deep within an ancient underwater civilization.

・Bancho Grill - New restaurant, new menu, same Bancho standards

Welcome to Bancho Grill, where bold jungle ingredients meet Bancho’s uncompromising culinary craft. Build relationships with the villagers and they might stop by as guests. See for yourself whether Bancho’s legendary cooking can win over the jungle too!

・Utara Village - a warm welcome in the jungle

Lend a hand to the villagers and build meaningful relationships. Some may be wary of outsiders at first… but a thoughtful gift or a great meal can go a long way!

・The jungle runs deeper

The jungle holds more than just villages and lakes. From mysterious ancient temples to eerie forests, Dave and his crew’s adventure continues deeper into the unknown!

AI Generated Content Disclosure

The developers describe how their game uses AI Generated Content like this:

Generative AI is used only to assist with localization/translation. All localized text is reviewed and edited by the developer.

No AI-generated art, audio, or in-game live generation is used.



System Requirements

Windows

MacOS

item.title: Backrooms Lost Runners
item.description:
Title: Backrooms Lost Runners
Genre: Action , Adventure , Indie , Early Access
Developer: ShimStudioGames
Publisher: ShimStudioGames
Release Date: Jun 17, 2026
Early Access Release Date: Jun 17, 2026




About This Game

Backrooms Lost Runners is a cooperative survival-horror experience where teamwork is your only real weapon

and even your voice can put you in danger.

Trapped inside the endless corridors of the Backrooms, you and your friends must explore abandoned camps, solve environmental puzzles, manage scarce resources, and survive encounters with entities that react to sound, light, and movement. Every dark hallway hides a threat. Every whisper can give you away. Every wrong decision can separate the group forever.

Key Features

Immersive Horror Atmosphere
Venture through dimly lit corridors, abandoned shelters, and unstable spaces filled with oppressive silence, dynamic lighting, and realistic sound design. In the Backrooms, every footstep matters and every moment of silence feels wrong.

Cooperative Survival
Survival depends on communication, trust, and coordination. Share resources, split responsibilities, solve puzzles together, and make difficult choices as a team. Staying together is safer but sometimes the best loot is found far from the group.

True Cooperative Gameplay

Collaboration is crucial for survival. Manage your resources, coordinate tactics via voice chat, and make collective choices.

Voice-Reactive Threats
Face entities with different behaviors and weaknesses. Some react to sound. Some hunt through darkness. Some appear when your mind starts to break. Learn how they behave, stay quiet when needed, and use your environment to survive.

Sanity System
Darkness, fear, isolation, and supernatural events affect your mental state. Stay near light, heat sources, and safe areas to slow sanity loss. If your mind collapses, the Backrooms will begin to change around you.

Tesseract Afterlife
Death is not the end. When you die, you are pulled into a surreal Tesseract realm where you must find a way back to life. But returning may cost you time, resources, and the safety of your team.

Storyline & Quest System

Discover journals, audio recordings, floppy disks, and unsettling traces of survivors. Piece together the timeline of the catastrophe, uncover the fates of those who were here before you, and find out what is really happening inside the Backrooms.


Resource Management & Character Progression

Scavenge for food, clothing, and tools to maintain health, stamina, and sanity. Will you risk venturing alone for high-value loot, or stick close to your squad?

Find valuable items and resources by exploring camps, lockers, and shelters.



Reality-Bending Anomalies

Zero-gravity zones, sudden teleportation gates, shifting walls, broken physics, and impossible spaces will force you to question what is real. In the Backrooms, the environment itself can become the enemy.

YOUR ADVENTURE IS JUST BEGINNING.

Descrierea conținutului pentru adulți indisponibilă.

System Requirements

Windows

    Minimum:
    • OS: Microsoft Windows 10 64-bit
    • Processor: i5-3570 3.4 GHz 4 Core or higher (or AMD equivalent)
    • Memory: 8 GB RAM
    • Graphics: GTX 1050 ti or higher
    • Storage: 6 GB available space
    Recommended:
    • OS: Microsoft Windows 10 64-bit
    • Processor: i7-7700K 4.20 GHz or higher (or AMD equivalent)
    • Memory: 16 GB RAM
    • Graphics: RTX 3060
    • Storage: 6 GB available space
item.content:encoded:
Title: Backrooms Lost Runners
Genre: Action , Adventure , Indie , Early Access
Developer: ShimStudioGames
Publisher: ShimStudioGames
Release Date: Jun 17, 2026
Early Access Release Date: Jun 17, 2026




About This Game

Backrooms Lost Runners is a cooperative survival-horror experience where teamwork is your only real weapon

and even your voice can put you in danger.

Trapped inside the endless corridors of the Backrooms, you and your friends must explore abandoned camps, solve environmental puzzles, manage scarce resources, and survive encounters with entities that react to sound, light, and movement. Every dark hallway hides a threat. Every whisper can give you away. Every wrong decision can separate the group forever.

Key Features

Immersive Horror Atmosphere
Venture through dimly lit corridors, abandoned shelters, and unstable spaces filled with oppressive silence, dynamic lighting, and realistic sound design. In the Backrooms, every footstep matters and every moment of silence feels wrong.

Cooperative Survival
Survival depends on communication, trust, and coordination. Share resources, split responsibilities, solve puzzles together, and make difficult choices as a team. Staying together is safer but sometimes the best loot is found far from the group.

True Cooperative Gameplay

Collaboration is crucial for survival. Manage your resources, coordinate tactics via voice chat, and make collective choices.

Voice-Reactive Threats
Face entities with different behaviors and weaknesses. Some react to sound. Some hunt through darkness. Some appear when your mind starts to break. Learn how they behave, stay quiet when needed, and use your environment to survive.

Sanity System
Darkness, fear, isolation, and supernatural events affect your mental state. Stay near light, heat sources, and safe areas to slow sanity loss. If your mind collapses, the Backrooms will begin to change around you.

Tesseract Afterlife
Death is not the end. When you die, you are pulled into a surreal Tesseract realm where you must find a way back to life. But returning may cost you time, resources, and the safety of your team.

Storyline & Quest System

Discover journals, audio recordings, floppy disks, and unsettling traces of survivors. Piece together the timeline of the catastrophe, uncover the fates of those who were here before you, and find out what is really happening inside the Backrooms.


Resource Management & Character Progression

Scavenge for food, clothing, and tools to maintain health, stamina, and sanity. Will you risk venturing alone for high-value loot, or stick close to your squad?

Find valuable items and resources by exploring camps, lockers, and shelters.



Reality-Bending Anomalies

Zero-gravity zones, sudden teleportation gates, shifting walls, broken physics, and impossible spaces will force you to question what is real. In the Backrooms, the environment itself can become the enemy.

YOUR ADVENTURE IS JUST BEGINNING.

Descrierea conținutului pentru adulți indisponibilă.

System Requirements

Windows

    Minimum:
    • OS: Microsoft Windows 10 64-bit
    • Processor: i5-3570 3.4 GHz 4 Core or higher (or AMD equivalent)
    • Memory: 8 GB RAM
    • Graphics: GTX 1050 ti or higher
    • Storage: 6 GB available space
    Recommended:
    • OS: Microsoft Windows 10 64-bit
    • Processor: i7-7700K 4.20 GHz or higher (or AMD equivalent)
    • Memory: 16 GB RAM
    • Graphics: RTX 3060
    • Storage: 6 GB available space

item.title: SWAPMEAT
item.description:
Title: SWAPMEAT
Genre: Action , Adventure , Indie
Developer: One More Game
Publisher: One More Game
Release Date: Jun 17, 2026
Early Access Release Date: Oct 21, 2025




About This Game

You are Squishy, a shape-shifting operative of Rangus Corp. Adapt to your enemies and outmaneuver them by stealing heads, torsos, and legs – each equipped with a unique power-- creating thousands of possible strategic combos. This unique mechanic makes you harder to kill and your gameplay more strategic, no matter what enemy you encounter.

1 - 4 Player Co-op

Survive your runs alone or recruit up to three friends to destroy aliens and swap their meat alongside you. With dynamically scaling difficulty, the game gets harder when players join and easier when they leave.

Swap on the Fly

If you’ve ever threatened to break someone’s arm and beat them with it, well, this is that mechanic in action, and the game for you. Every limb and extremity you equip changes your strategy instantly. Rapid adaptation is your key to success. For example, equip Squat Daddy legs to jump and butt-slam enemies, or an Octo Swirl head that shoots in all directions! This upgrade path is unique to SWAPMEAT: evolving strategically mid-combat, stealing abilities and turning them against your enemies. Muahahaha.

Fast, Relentless Combat

SWAPMEAT forces improvisation in a fresh new way: you work with what drops and learn to thrive in unpredictability, while under constant siege by alien weirdos.

Waves of screwball enemies threaten to overwhelm you, but every weapon can be stolen for yourself. Dodge, shoot, and swap your way through escalating chaos while racing against time to complete objectives.

Risk of Rain 2 and co-op shooters like Helldivers 2 inspired our developers, but the speed of core combat harks back to some of our favorite games, such as Quake 3, Serious Sam, and Overwatch. Hark!

Roguelite Replayability

Each mission throws new enemies, random events, and unexpected part combinations at you. No two runs are ever the same. Every death teaches you something new.

Permanent Upgrades Between Runs

Bring your research back to HQ and cash it in for weapon unlocks, new perks, and company-approved improvements. Over time, you get more powerful between runs.

Hostile Alien Worlds

Drop into random and bizarre planets, from an urban speedway thick with hungry mutant speedsters to a planetary cookout overrun by hostile aliens. Battle across wackadoodle, vivid landscapes strewn with the ruins of galactic capitalism, ancient tech, and '90's references.

Difficulty Levels

SWAPMEAT offers four different difficulty levels, from Casual to Nightmare.

Pop-Quiz

If you've read this far, you get a perfect score on today's pop-quiz. Congratulations! Have a glizzy. Mmm.

Descrierea conținutului pentru adulți indisponibilă.

System Requirements

Windows

MacOS
item.content:encoded:
Title: SWAPMEAT
Genre: Action , Adventure , Indie
Developer: One More Game
Publisher: One More Game
Release Date: Jun 17, 2026
Early Access Release Date: Oct 21, 2025




About This Game

You are Squishy, a shape-shifting operative of Rangus Corp. Adapt to your enemies and outmaneuver them by stealing heads, torsos, and legs – each equipped with a unique power-- creating thousands of possible strategic combos. This unique mechanic makes you harder to kill and your gameplay more strategic, no matter what enemy you encounter.

1 - 4 Player Co-op

Survive your runs alone or recruit up to three friends to destroy aliens and swap their meat alongside you. With dynamically scaling difficulty, the game gets harder when players join and easier when they leave.

Swap on the Fly

If you’ve ever threatened to break someone’s arm and beat them with it, well, this is that mechanic in action, and the game for you. Every limb and extremity you equip changes your strategy instantly. Rapid adaptation is your key to success. For example, equip Squat Daddy legs to jump and butt-slam enemies, or an Octo Swirl head that shoots in all directions! This upgrade path is unique to SWAPMEAT: evolving strategically mid-combat, stealing abilities and turning them against your enemies. Muahahaha.

Fast, Relentless Combat

SWAPMEAT forces improvisation in a fresh new way: you work with what drops and learn to thrive in unpredictability, while under constant siege by alien weirdos.

Waves of screwball enemies threaten to overwhelm you, but every weapon can be stolen for yourself. Dodge, shoot, and swap your way through escalating chaos while racing against time to complete objectives.

Risk of Rain 2 and co-op shooters like Helldivers 2 inspired our developers, but the speed of core combat harks back to some of our favorite games, such as Quake 3, Serious Sam, and Overwatch. Hark!

Roguelite Replayability

Each mission throws new enemies, random events, and unexpected part combinations at you. No two runs are ever the same. Every death teaches you something new.

Permanent Upgrades Between Runs

Bring your research back to HQ and cash it in for weapon unlocks, new perks, and company-approved improvements. Over time, you get more powerful between runs.

Hostile Alien Worlds

Drop into random and bizarre planets, from an urban speedway thick with hungry mutant speedsters to a planetary cookout overrun by hostile aliens. Battle across wackadoodle, vivid landscapes strewn with the ruins of galactic capitalism, ancient tech, and '90's references.

Difficulty Levels

SWAPMEAT offers four different difficulty levels, from Casual to Nightmare.

Pop-Quiz

If you've read this far, you get a perfect score on today's pop-quiz. Congratulations! Have a glizzy. Mmm.

Descrierea conținutului pentru adulți indisponibilă.

System Requirements

Windows

MacOS

item.title: goblinAmerica
item.description:
Title: goblinAmerica
Genre: Action , Indie , Early Access
Developer: Gil Lawson
Publisher: Gil Lawson
Release Date: Jun 17, 2026
Early Access Release Date: Jun 17, 2026




About This Game

goblinAmerica is a squirmy, bouncy shooter filled with lovely sights and horrible places.

You are a solarcel—a spirit invented by the sun. You must possess every U.S. president at the worst moment in each of their lives to correct the course of history and repel the forces of Bedlam. If you do your job, nothing bad will ever happen to anyone that matters. Everybody's life can be beautiful forever.

YOU ARE A SLIPPERY THING

Blast, bounce, slide, careen, swing, assault, and explode your way across a beautiful world with an unimaginable array of weapons, tools, items, and creams.

YOU ARE A WORLDWIDE WIZARD

goblinAmerica's surface hides deep, strange secrets. You choose how you'll access them: Earn precious medals with your dizzying speed, scour the world in search of holy items, or befriend strangers to mutual benefit.

YOU ARE A SOLARCEL

The Verminstar cowers in the Land of Being Attacked and commands the forces of Bedlam. An otherworldly swamp roils far from the Yellow Sun's adoring light. The blighted moon goblins carry out guerilla warfare from their little holes. You need to be every president. Don't let us down.

Mature Content Description

The developers describe the content like this:

The game contains stylized and cartoonish gun violence and occasional swear words.



System Requirements

Windows

    Minimum:
    • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
    • OS: Windows 10
    • Processor: Quad-core Intel or AMD, 2.5 GHz or faster
    • Memory: 8 GB RAM
    • Graphics: GeForce GTX 1070
    • DirectX: Version 12
    • Storage: 10 GB available space
    Recommended:
    • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
item.content:encoded:
Title: goblinAmerica
Genre: Action , Indie , Early Access
Developer: Gil Lawson
Publisher: Gil Lawson
Release Date: Jun 17, 2026
Early Access Release Date: Jun 17, 2026




About This Game

goblinAmerica is a squirmy, bouncy shooter filled with lovely sights and horrible places.

You are a solarcel—a spirit invented by the sun. You must possess every U.S. president at the worst moment in each of their lives to correct the course of history and repel the forces of Bedlam. If you do your job, nothing bad will ever happen to anyone that matters. Everybody's life can be beautiful forever.

YOU ARE A SLIPPERY THING

Blast, bounce, slide, careen, swing, assault, and explode your way across a beautiful world with an unimaginable array of weapons, tools, items, and creams.

YOU ARE A WORLDWIDE WIZARD

goblinAmerica's surface hides deep, strange secrets. You choose how you'll access them: Earn precious medals with your dizzying speed, scour the world in search of holy items, or befriend strangers to mutual benefit.

YOU ARE A SOLARCEL

The Verminstar cowers in the Land of Being Attacked and commands the forces of Bedlam. An otherworldly swamp roils far from the Yellow Sun's adoring light. The blighted moon goblins carry out guerilla warfare from their little holes. You need to be every president. Don't let us down.

Mature Content Description

The developers describe the content like this:

The game contains stylized and cartoonish gun violence and occasional swear words.



System Requirements

Windows

    Minimum:
    • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
    • OS: Windows 10
    • Processor: Quad-core Intel or AMD, 2.5 GHz or faster
    • Memory: 8 GB RAM
    • Graphics: GeForce GTX 1070
    • DirectX: Version 12
    • Storage: 10 GB available space
    Recommended:
    • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
